nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: AI definitely removes technical barriers that are frustrating/difficult and provides a way to enhance creativity

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as repetitive and redundant follow-up
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes if I feel stuck at the beginning of a project I will use an AI tool to brainstorm various approaches

nodes.label: AI as tool for generating visual and video elements
nodes.label_negative: Stock photos and manual editing with multiple tools
nodes.grounding_span: Instead of using stock photos and videos, or having to use photo editing and video production software, I can now use AI tools that create what I want

nodes.label: AI integration with existing platforms
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to seek out AI tools that are multi-functional so I don't have to flip from one piece of software to another

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over creative work and reducing human share
nodes.grounding_span: I am driving the collaboration and creative decision making

nodes.label: Intellectual property protection when using AI
nodes.label_negative: Unethical AI training on creator content without compensation
nodes.grounding_span: Even if I copyright my work, it is in digital format which means it will be used at some point by AI to complete a project I won't be paid for

nodes.label: Personal fulfillment through creative engagement
nodes.grounding_span: I am better able to meet my creative objectives

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This saved me time which allowed me to focus more on producing engaging content

nodes.label: Professional quality and thoroughness
nodes.grounding_span: I save time and end up with better, more unique products for my clients

nodes.label: Ethical and responsible AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that concepts of ethical design will be left behind

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I absolutely loved the creative options I had through using Thinglink's AI and software platform

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes the follow up questions are repetitive or redundant and I find that frustrating

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing junior roles
nodes.grounding_span: I see the definite possibility of AI taking over my work

nodes.label: Worry about unethical use of copyrighted work
nodes.grounding_span: Even if I copyright my work, it is in digital format which means it will be used at some point by AI to complete a project I won't be paid for

nodes.label: Iterative expansion from initial concept to final product
nodes.grounding_span: I like taking an idea and expanding on it, often to the point where the final product is very different than the initial concept

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool-seeking for multifunctionality
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to seek out AI tools that are multi-functional so I don't have to flip from one piece of software to another
